batch_summary.note: 1 primary RF-15 flag(s). See primary_flags for details.

primary_flags.summary: Physical harm allegations via Olivia relay. Sep-Oct 2024 period. RF-04 B-019 flags ROW-7071-7091 (Sev-1) and ROW-7161-7170 (Sev-2) include harm allegation content delivered through Olivia. Category A relay (allegations attributed to Olivia that cannot be Eli-side confirmed). Compound RF-15+RF-08. Sev-2 (pattern: third instance of harm-via-relay mechanism in B-019 window).
primary_flags.exact_quote: Sep-Oct 2024 harm relay content — see RF-04 B-019 ROW-7071-7170 for exact text.
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: RF-04 B-019 has 4 primary flags. RF-08 B-019 also has signal in this window (S005 harm allegations via Olivia). RF-15 primary identifies the false-allegation content of the relay.
